evidence: Phase 0A foundation landed: crates/gjc-app-server scaffolded (Cargo.toml, lib.rs, ids.rs, error.rs, jsonrpc.rs, identity.rs). cargo build -p gjc-app-server OK; cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 13 passed. Implements immutable ThreadId + monotonic BackendGeneration + stale-event rejection (identity.rs), JSON-RPC 2.0 framing with jsonrpc header omitted (jsonrpc.rs), and error codes incl -32001 overload (error.rs).
rationale: Record durable evidence of the first Phase 0A slice before continuing with the isolation audit, scheduler, schema-gen, codex matrix, and state machine; G001 remains active and is not yet complete.

evidence: Phase 0A slice 2: added scheduler.rs (lane classification + per-thread Admission with -32001 overload, concurrent-turns test), field_policy.rs (lenient codex-core / strict gjc-* unknown-field enforcement), item_state.rs (item/turn states + TerminalLatch coalescing: failed>interrupted>completed, one turn/completed guarantee), backend.rs (object-safe AgentBackend seam trait mirroring AgentSession + BackendFactory + BackendEvent), and docs/phase0-isolation-audit.md (singleton binding contract). cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 30 passed; clippy clean under deny-level lints (6 nursery doc-length warns only).
rationale: Durable evidence of Phase 0A design gates (scheduler, field policy, state machine core, seam trait, isolation audit) landing incrementally with tests; G001 still active pending schema-gen wiring, codex field matrix, dispatcher/server, pi-natives skeleton, and the live two-simultaneous-turns conformance test.

evidence: Phase 0A slice 3: added server.rs (AppServer dispatcher: per-connection initialize/initialized handshake gate, DashMap thread registry, per-thread Admission, lock-free-across-backend-calls dispatch). Wired thread/start, thread/read, thread/loaded/list, turn/start (with -32001 admission), turn/interrupt. cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 34 passed incl. two_simultaneous_running_turns (wall-time proves concurrency, no cap), rejects_requests_before_initialize (NOT_INITIALIZED), unknown_method_is_method_not_found, turn_start_ignores_unknown_codex_fields (lenient).
rationale: Durable evidence that the Phase 0A dispatcher core works with real concurrent turns; remaining Phase 0A = schema-gen wiring (schemars/ts-rs), explicit codex field-matrix tests, and the pi-natives app_server.rs N-API skeleton + build:native.

evidence: Phase 0A slice 4 (schema-gen): added schemars to workspace + crate; 17 JsonSchema derives on wire types; src/schema.rs bundle (Request/Response/Notification/RequestId/AppServerError/ThreadIdentity/ThreadStatus/SessionMetadata/ItemState/TurnState/TerminalCause) + src/bin/schema.rs generator/--check; committed schemas/app-server.schema.json; wired into package.json generate-schemas + check:schemas. Verified: cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 37 passed; recipe check:schemas passes end-to-end (TS + Rust drift checks green); 0 clippy errors.
rationale: Phase 0A schema-gen blocking gate satisfied with Rust protocol types as source of truth and CI drift check. Remaining Phase 0A: ts-rs TS-type emission, explicit codex v1 field-matrix tests, and pi-natives app_server.rs N-API skeleton + build:native.

evidence: Phase 0A slice 5 (N-API skeleton): added gjc-app-server dep to pi-natives; crates/pi-natives/src/app_server.rs exposes AppServer napi class + appServerSchemaJson() + appServerMethodLane(). cargo build -p pi-natives OK; build:native (bun --cwd=packages/natives run build) succeeds, native addon built, TS bindings regenerated (66 exports); index.d.ts + index.js now export AppServer/appServerSchemaJson/appServerMethodLane. Phase 0A now has: crate scaffold, identity+generation, scheduler+admission, field policy, item-state coalescing, AgentBackend seam, dispatcher (two-concurrent-turns fixture), isolation audit, schema-gen wired into check:schemas, and the N-API skeleton building via build:native.
rationale: Phase 0A blocking gates substantially satisfied and building end-to-end. G001 not yet closed: remaining = ts-rs TS type emission, full app-server-conformance fixture set, and the mandatory quality gate (architect + executor QA). Phases 1-9 remain.

evidence: Phase 1 core slice: added src/event_map.rs (ThreadStream) mapping gjc AgentEvent -> codex item/turn notifications: agent_start->turn/started, message_start->item/started(agentMessage), text_delta->item/agentMessage/delta, tool_execution_start/end->item started/completed with tool classification (bash->commandExecution, edit/write->fileChange), agent_end->turn/completed(completed), abort->interrupted, error->failed; single-turn/completed coalescing via TerminalLatch (guarded on active turn); lossless gjc/event raw passthrough for every event incl unmapped; monotonic per-thread seq + threadId on all frames. 6 new fixtures incl terminal coalescing (found+fixed a double-completed bug). cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 43 passed; 0 clippy errors.
rationale: Resolves the plan's mechanical protocol-mapping deliverable deterministically with fixtures; feeds Phase 1 core runtime. Remaining Phase 1: TS AgentBackend callback bridge + app-server-mode.ts + CLI entrypoint wiring emitBackendEvent through ThreadStream.

evidence: Phase 1 integration slice: wired event flow into server.rs — added EventSink trait, per-thread ThreadStream in the registry, and AppServer::emit_backend_event(ev) that (1) drops events for unknown threads, (2) rejects stale/wrong-generation/deleted events via ThreadIdentity::accepts_event, (3) maps live events through ThreadStream to codex item/turn notifications, (4) pushes to the sink. 3 new tests (flow to sink incl turn/started+turn/completed; stale generation rejected -> 0 emitted; unknown thread dropped). cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 46 passed; 0 clippy errors.
rationale: Ties identity + event_map + registry + dispatcher into one coherent core; the stale-generation guard is now integration-tested end to end. Remaining Phase 1: the TS-side AgentBackend callback bridge (pi-natives threadsafe fns), app-server-mode.ts, and CLI/main.ts wiring so real AgentSession events reach emit_backend_event.

evidence: Phase 1/2 method-surface slice: dispatcher extended with turn/steer + gjc extensions (gjc/state/read, gjc/messages/get, gjc/model/set, gjc/compact) via backend_and_ctx helper (lane-aware, no registry lock across backend calls); field_policy::enforce applied so gjc/* strictly rejects unknown fields while codex-core stays lenient. 5 new dispatcher tests incl gjc_model_set_rejects_unknown_fields_strictly (INVALID_PARAMS) and turn_steer_routes_to_backend. cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 50 passed; 0 clippy errors.
rationale: End-to-end field-policy enforcement + gjc management surface now proven through the real dispatcher. Remaining Phase 1: TS callback bridge + app-server-mode.ts + main.ts/CLI wiring; then Phases 2-9.

evidence: Added crates/gjc-app-server/tests/conformance.rs — the named app-server-conformance integration suite (public-API, end-to-end): full_streamed_turn_lifecycle (ordered turn/started->item/started->delta->turn/completed, exactly one completed), concurrent_threads_have_independent_streams (per-thread turn/completed), stale_generation_event_is_rejected, gjc_extension_strictly_rejects_unknown_fields (INVALID_PARAMS), codex_core_ignores_unknown_fields, requests_before_initialize_are_rejected (NOT_INITIALIZED). cargo test -p gjc-app-server --test conformance = 6 passed; full crate = 50 unit + 6 conformance.
rationale: Formalizes a named Phase 0A/1 acceptance gate as an external integration suite exercising the public surface end to end. Remaining: TS callback bridge + app-server-mode.ts + main.ts wiring (Phase 1 completion), then Phases 2-9.

evidence: Phase 1 thread-lifecycle slice: added thread/resume, thread/fork (forkedFromId projection), thread/delete (marks Deleted + bumps generation so late events go stale + disposes backend + removes from registry), thread/archive (rejects when a turn is Running via CONFLICT) via a shared register() helper. 3 new tests: thread_delete_removes_thread_and_rejects_later_reads (NOT_FOUND after delete), thread_archive_sets_archived_status, thread_resume_and_fork_register_new_threads. cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 53 unit + 6 conformance passed; 0 clippy errors.
rationale: Completes the codex thread lifecycle surface in the Rust dispatcher with tests. Remaining Phase 1: TS callback bridge (pi-natives TSFN factory + emitBackendEvent) + app-server-mode.ts + main.ts/CLI wiring; then Phases 2-9.

evidence: Interop-hardening slice: handle_initialize now rejects a second initialize request on the same connection (ConnectionState.initialize_seen -> 'Already initialized'), matching codex. Conformance test duplicate_initialize_is_rejected added. cargo test -p gjc-app-server = 53 unit + 7 conformance passed; 0 clippy errors.
rationale: Advances Phase 8 codex v1 negative-behavior semantics early with a test. evidence: Phase 1 bridge LANDED: crates/pi-natives/src/app_server.rs now hosts the core gjc_app_server::AppServer via the repo's inverted-control napi pattern.
